code_review_verified.terminal_pull_key_in_PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS: CONFIRMED — verify.py line 193: {key: 'terminal_pull', label: 'Terminal — Pull PO or Transfer', module: 'Terminal', defaults: ['admin_pin', 'manager_pin', 'totp']}
code_review_verified.qr_cross_branch_action_totp_only: CONFIRMED — verify.py line 191: {key: 'qr_cross_branch_action', defaults: ['totp']} — only TOTP method allowed
code_review_verified.qr_pair_no_hardcoded_admin_role: CONFIRMED — terminal.py lines 219-221: actual_role = initiating_user.get('role', 'manager') if initiating_user else 'manager'
code_review_verified.doc_search_endpoint_location: CONFIRMED — doc_lookup.py lines 364-440: GET /doc/search endpoint with branch-scoped queries

action_items: Company admin credentials (jovelyneahig@gmail.com / Aa@050772) return 401 — verify credentials are correct or update them for future testing
critical_code_review_comments: doc_lookup.py: The /doc/search endpoint is NOT auth-protected (no Depends(get_current_user)). It's called from the terminal with the terminal's auth token via the api instance. This is fine for terminal use but it means anyone with the endpoint URL can search documents by branch_id — consider adding optional auth or rate limiting.

terminal.py: pull-po and pull-transfer both correctly use verify_pin_for_action with branch_id restriction. The branch_id for pull-po comes from the PO itself (po.get('branch_id')), and for pull-transfer it uses to_branch_id (receiving branch). This is correct.
verify.py: terminal_pull and qr_cross_branch_action both correctly added to PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS. The qr_cross_branch_action has only 'totp' in defaults — good security design.
DocViewerPage.jsx: isForeignBranch uses useMemo and only checks when both terminalBranchId (from ?branch=) and basic.branch_id exist. Correct implementation.
TerminalShell.jsx: performDocSearch is called with session.branchId correctly. Navigation uses navigate('/doc/CODE?branch=session.branchId') correctly in both manual input and result click handlers.

success_rate.backend: 97% (30/31 tests pass, 1 skipped for no available transfers)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing invoices in Branch 1 (SI-B1-001035 / 8423KQNW) for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 133 verified: 1) GET /api/doc/search endpoint works (returns results for q=SI, 400 for missing params), 2) terminal_pull and qr_cross_branch_action keys exist in PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS with correct defaults, 3) QR pair uses actual user role not hardcoded admin, 4) pull-po and pull-transfer are branch-restricted, 5) DocViewerPage has two reprint buttons (58mm thermal + full page) working via PrintEngine, 6) Cross-branch TOTP gate shown correctly when ?branch= doesn't match doc branch, 7) Terminal smart search dropdown works with navigation including ?branch= param.
